eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Arizona; at 7:17 PM on JUN 26, 2026 Effective until 3:17 AM JUN 27, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety.  A SAFE Alert has been issued for Pinal County. The Pinal County Sheriffs Office is looking for 77 year old Stephen Rondeau.  Stephen is a white male, 6 feet 2 inches tall, 210 pounds, and has gray hair with hazel eyes.  He was last seen wearing a tan t-shirt and a tan bucket hat.  Stephen was last seen at 1:00 PM on June 26, 2026, on foot near Ironwood Drive and Mckellips Boulevard in Apache Junction, Arizona.  Stephen has a medical condition which may cause him to become lost or easily confused.  If you have seen Stephen, please contact the Pinal County Sheriffs Office at 520-866-5111 or call 911. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
